hero.imageAlt: HVAC technician installing a central air unit
hero.headline: Next Level Climate.

intro.label: We are Elite HVAC
intro.body: We're a modern climate-control contractor. Our install crews and emergency techs keep homes and businesses at the right temperature year-round — licensed, insured, and backed by a 10-year labor warranty.

configuratorTeaser.headline: Find out what size system you need.
configuratorTeaser.body: Get a quick sizing estimate based on your square footage, insulation level, and climate zone.

zPatternRows.label: Our Services
zPatternRows.headline: Install, service, and emergency repair.
zPatternRows.body: From high-efficiency new installs to same-day emergency calls. Every job starts with upfront pricing and ends with a satisfied customer.

zPatternRows.label: Trusted Equipment
zPatternRows.headline: The brands that last.
zPatternRows.body: We install Carrier, Trane, and Lennox — systems chosen for reliability, efficiency, and warranty support. All parts are OEM, backed by the manufacturer.

footerCta.headline: Configure your HVAC system.
footerCta.subhead: Get in touch for a free sizing and install quote.
